word: H6202 - עָרַף - ʻâraph - aw-raf' - That is beheaded

sections.paragraph:
Original: ערף

Transliteration: ‛âraph

Phonetic: aw-raf'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Qal) to break the neck (of an animal)

Origin: a primitive root [identical with H6201 through the idea of sloping]

TWOT entry: 1700

Part(s) of speech: Verb
